reviews.review_msg: The professor's class is engaging, but the course lacks assignments to make up a fair grade. You could think you're doing well, but find out you're doing badly only after the course ends because you don't get assignments back in time. Feedback is not clear once you get the assignment. Marking is extremely unfair. The material is interesting tho.

His lectures are very interesting and you can tell he is passionate about the subject. This makes his 4 hour evening seminars engaging and encourages interesting in class discussions. Unfortunately, the course material is incredibly difficult and he assigns an impossible amount of weekly reading. Hardest class I've ever took.
